query:
SELECT category, COUNT(*) as count FROM timeline_events GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC;
SELECT COUNT(*) as federal_count FROM timeline_events WHERE category = 'federal_case';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2N1WTErRdSjheBh.e46440e12186 --database 3yhU3DrKzf8Z5BNtvxatFF --execute SELECT category, COUNT(*) as count FROM timeline_events GROUP BY category ORDER BY count DESC;
SELECT COUNT(*) as federal_count FROM timeline_events WHERE category = 'federal_case';
